business.name: Heroic Landscapes
business.tagline: The lawn heroes Jacksonville actually calls

hero.headline: When other landscapers *let you down*, we show up like legends
hero.subheadline: 4.9 stars from 48 neighbors who know — James and crew don't just cut grass, they rescue yards.

services_section.label: THE RESCUE MISSIONS
services_section.heading: Every yard problem has a hero
services_section.subheading: From lawn meltdowns to sprinkler mysteries — we've seen it all and fixed it all

services.title: Weekly Lawn Care
services.description: Cut, edge, and blow every time. Weekly in summer, bi-weekly when it cools down. Your neighbors already know the routine.

services.title: Irrigation Repair & Install
services.description: Pump died? Need a wifi controller? We'll diagnose the real problem and get your system running right.

services.title: Lawn Recovery
services.description: When other companies bail or retire, we step in. Specializing in fixing what went wrong before.

services.title: System Diagnostics
services.description: Think it's a sprinkler leak? Could be JEA. We'll dig around until we find the real culprit — no charge for being wrong.

about.heading: James and crew — the Jacksonville lawn legends
about.body: We're the team your neighbors call when their yard needs real help. Funny, upbeat, and we genuinely love what we do. Whether it's a weekly cut or solving an irrigation mystery, we show up ready to work. Based right here in Jacksonville, serving the neighborhoods we live in.

reviews.name: H B.
reviews.text: If superheroes carried weed whackers, they'd be James and his crew. Called them during a total lawn meltdown and they showed up like legends.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Lives down the street and takes care of many yards in our neighborhood. Cuts weekly in summer, bi-weekly in fall. Always edges and blows.

reviews.name: Angie A.
reviews.text: Needed an irrigation pump. James knew exactly what size I needed and could install a wifi controller too. Sent pictures and he handled everything.

reviews.name: Skip K.
reviews.text: When our old company retired, they transferred us to Heroic. We were skeptical at first, but James proved we didn't need to worry.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Jacksonville neighborhoods
service_areas.subheading: From Riverside to Mandarin — if you're in Duval County, we've got you covered

cta.heading: Ready for a lawn that doesn't embarrass you?
cta.body: Join 48 neighbors who already know — when you need heroes for your yard, you call James. Free estimates, real solutions.
